_comment: Activity Logs - THE PULSE of clawmmand-center
_philosophy: Every action logged with DETAIL. Fresh timestamps = living system.

developments.title: Activity Log format updated to match reference design
developments.description: Updated entry format to include detailed descriptions, status indicators, and metrics. Each entry now shows: title, full description, section tag, status (Working/Complete/TODO), and expected outcomes.

developments.title: Data files moved to /public folder
developments.description: Fixed Vercel deployment issue. Moved transcripts.json and developments.json from /src/data to /public/data. Updated fetch paths from '/src/data/' to '/data/'. Files now accessible on live site.

developments.title: TikTok transcript marked as Ready
developments.description: Processed TikTok video: 'Manipulación: Evita las Trampas Comunes' by @one_1_ness. Extracted metadata: 310K likes, 1,946 comments, 169.5K favorites. Duration: 1:33. Music: dereal (Slowed). Status changed from Processing to Ready.

developments.title: Transcript Log now loads from JSON
developments.description: Updated TranscriptLog component to load transcripts from /data/transcripts.json instead of hardcoded array. Added support for displaying stats (likes, comments) and music track information.

developments.title: TikTok video processed and added to dashboard
developments.description: Extracted metadata from TikTok URL (https://vt.tiktok.com/ZSuK5vGJX/). Video: 'Manipulación: Evita las Trampas Comunes'. Creator: @one_1_ness. Captured engagement stats and music track. Added to transcripts.json with status: Processing.

developments.title: Gmail QR automation script created
developments.description: Built scripts/gmail-qr-extractor.js for automated QR code extraction. Script opens Gmail (openclawian@gmail.com), searches for Eventbrite emails, extracts QR codes, saves to dashboard data. Added 'Check Gmail' button to My Tickets section.

developments.title: Distance format changed to kilometers
developments.description: Updated distance display from miles to kilometers for NYC visitors. Added formatDistance() function that converts miles to km (miles × 1.60934). Example: '2.3 miles' now shows as '3.7 km away'. Perfect for visitors who don't track miles.

developments.title: Relative date format implemented
developments.description: Replaced calendar dates with relative format: 'Today', 'Tomorrow', 'In X days', 'In X weeks'. No need to track calendar dates. Example: 'Mar 28, 6:00 PM' now shows as 'Tomorrow'. Includes time context: 'Today (starting soon!)' or 'Today • 3h from now'.

developments.title: Eventbrite section rebuilt with dark theme
developments.description: Complete UI rebuild with GitHub-style dark theme (#0d1117 background). Added QR code display area, 'Check Eventbrite Status' button, FREE/Reserved badges, QR Ready/Awaiting QR badges, collapsible Past Events section. Auto-filters past events automatically.

developments.title: SOUL.md and identity files restored
developments.description: Restored SOUL.md, USER.md, IDENTITY.md after accidental deletion. Rebuilt assistant identity with core philosophy: 'Dashboard is ONE ORGANISM, Activity Logs are the pulse'. Created RECOVERY.md and START_HERE.md for emergency recovery.
